title: Routes Project
description: Authoritative HTTP contract (methods, paths, query, bodies, status codes) for **Routes Project** under `/v1`. Handlers and OpenAPI MUST match this spec exactly so CLI, agents, and Studio stay aligned. Project-level read and schema validation.
context: Authoritative HTTP contract (methods, paths, query, bodies, status codes) for **Routes Project** under `/v1`. Handlers and OpenAPI MUST match this spec exactly so CLI, agents, and Studio stay aligned. Project-level read and schema validation.

rules.requirement: project routes expose config status context and schema
rules: The API MUST provide `GET /project`, `/project/status`, `/project/context`, `/project/schema`, and `POST /project/schema/validate` under `/v1`.

rules.requirement: project status aggregates lists and graph freshness
rules: `GET /project/status` MUST compose active/draft/discarded/archive counts and a `graph` summary equivalent to CLI `project status --graph`, including `stale`, `currentRef`, `fingerprintMismatch`, and `warnings[]` per [`api:dto-project-status`](../dto-project-status/spec.md).
`GET /v1/project/status` MUST return `graph.warnings` as an array (possibly empty) when graph health is available, with stale and fingerprint diagnostics present when computed.

rules.requirement: GET project echoes auth type for clients
rules: `GET /project` MUST include `auth: { type }` matching effective server configuration without secrets.

Every `params`, `query`, and `body` shape accepted by this route group MUST be declared in Fastify route schema and validated before handler logic runs.

For `GET /project/context`, boolean and numeric query flags such as `followDeps` and `depth` MUST reject malformed values with HTTP 400 `application/problem+json` and code `INVALID_REQUEST`.

constraints: @specd/api delivery and composition code MUST import host bootstrap and kernel types from @specd/sdk, not @specd/core or @specd/code-graph directly.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

AND stale and fingerprint diagnostics are present when computed
